patches.description: Adds a button that triggers the same action as shaking your phone would.
patches.name: Add 'Give Kudos' button to 'Group Activity'

patches.description: Extends the full-screen media viewer menu with items to copy or open their URLs or download them directly.
patches.name: Add media download
Add more double tap to seek length options

patches.description: Adds options to replace video thumbnails using the DeArrow API or image captures from the video.
patches.name: Alternative thumbnails

patches.description: Open Amazon links, even if the app is not set to handle Amazon links.
patches.name: Always allow deep-linking

patches.description: Adds an option to show announcements from ReVanced on app startup.
patches.name: Announcements

patches.description:
View stories without sending any information to the server. 
Your view will not appear in the story viewers list. 
Note: Since no data is sent, a story you have already viewed may appear as new on another device.
patches.name: Anonymous story viewing

patches.description: Automatically claim Channel Points.
patches.name: Auto claim channel points

patches.description: Blocks audio ads in streams and VODs.
patches.name: Block audio ads

patches.description: Blocks embedded stream ads using services like Luminous or PurpleAdBlocker.
patches.name: Block embedded ads

patches.description: Blocks Snowplow analytics. See https://snowplow.io for more information.
patches.name: Block Snowplow tracking

patches.description: Blocks video ads in streams and VODs.
patches.name: Block video ads

patches.description: Removes firmware and region blacklisting. This patch will still not allow the app to run on devices that do not have the required hardware.
patches.name: Bypass device checks

patches.description: Adds an option to use a different host for user avatar and channel images and can fix missing images that are blocked in some countries.
patches.name: Bypass image region restrictions

patches.description: Allows the use of the app after its discontinuation.
patches.name: Bypass login

patches.description: Removes the restriction to use the app with root permissions or on a custom ROM.

patches.description: Adds an option to bypass URL redirects and open the original URL directly.

patches.description: Adds an option to change the UI appearance to a phone, tablet, or automotive device.
patches.name: Change form factor

patches.description: Adds an option to change the header logo in the top left corner of the app.
patches.name: Change header

options.description:
Folder with images to use as a custom header logo.

The folder must contain one or more of the following folders, depending on the DPI of the device:
- drawable-hdpi
- drawable-xhdpi
- drawable-xxhdpi
- drawable-xxxhdpi

Each of the folders must contain all of the following files:
revanced_header_custom_light.png
revanced_header_custom_dark.png 

The image dimensions must be as follows:
- drawable-hdpi: 194x72 px
- drawable-xhdpi: 258x96 px
- drawable-xxhdpi: 387x144 px
- drawable-xxxhdpi: 512x192 px
options.name: Custom header logo

patches.description: Adds options to change the app icon and app name. Branding cannot be changed for mounted (root) installations.
patches.name: Custom branding

options.description: Custom app name.
options.name: App name

options.description:
Folder with images to use as a custom icon.

The folder must contain one or more of the following folders, depending on the DPI of the device:
- mipmap-mdpi
- mipmap-hdpi
- mipmap-xhdpi
- mipmap-xxhdpi
- mipmap-xxxhdpi

Each of the folders must contain all of the following files:
revanced_adaptive_background_custom.png
revanced_adaptive_foreground_custom.png

The image dimensions must be as follows:
- mipmap-mdpi: 108x108 px
- mipmap-hdpi: 162x162 px
- mipmap-xhdpi: 216x216 px
- mipmap-xxhdpi: 324x324 px
- mipmap-xxxhdpi: 432x432 px

Optionally, the path contains a 'drawable' folder with any of the monochrome icon files:
revanced_adaptive_monochrome_custom.xml
revanced_notification_icon_custom.xml
options.name: Custom icon

patches.description: Allows trusting custom certificate authorities for a specific domain.
patches.name: Custom network security

options.description: List of domains to which the custom trust configuration will be applied (one domain per entry).
options.name: Target domains

options.description: Applies the configuration to all subdomains of the target domains.
options.name: Include subdomains

options.description:
List of paths to files in PEM or DER format (one file path per entry).

Makes an app trust the provided custom certificate authorities (CAs),
for the specified domains, and if the option "Include Subdomains" is enabled then also the subdomains.


CA files will be bundled in res/raw/ of resulting APK
options.name: Custom CA file paths

options.description: Makes an app trust certificates from the Android user store for the specified domains, and if the option "Include Subdomains" is enabled then also the subdomains.
options.name: Trust user added CAs

options.description: Makes an app trust certificates from the Android system store for the specified domains, and and if the option "Include Subdomains" is enabled then also the subdomains.
options.name: Trust system CAs

options.description: Allows unencrypted HTTP traffic for the specified domains, and if "Include Subdomains" is enabled then also the subdomains.
options.name: Allow cleartext traffic (HTTP)

options.description: Overrides certificate pinning for the specified domains and their subdomains if the option "Include Subdomains" is enabled to allow inspecting app traffic via a proxy.
options.name: Override certificate pinning

patches.description: Replaces a hexadecimal patterns of bytes of files in an APK.
patches.name: Hex

options.description:
Hexadecimal patterns to search for and replace with another in a target file.

A pattern is a sequence of case insensitive strings, each representing hexadecimal bytes, separated by spaces.
An example pattern is 'aa 01 02 FF'.

Every pattern must be followed by a pipe ('|'), the replacement pattern,
another pipe ('|'), and the path to the file to make the changes in relative to the APK root. 
The replacement pattern must be shorter or equal in length to the pattern.

Full example of a valid replacement:
'01 02 aa FF|03 04|path/to/file'
options.name: Replacements
